import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for t in tokens
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn add_unique(_ acc: List<Int>, _ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut r = acc
  for x in xs
    if not list.contains(r, x)
      r = list.push(r, x)
    end
  end
  r
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      mut next: List<Int> = []
      mut removed = false
      for v in remaining
        if v == m and not removed
          removed = true
        else
          next = list.push(next, v)
        end
      end
      remaining = next
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let a = parse_line(line1)
  let b = parse_line(line2)
  let step1 = add_unique([], a)
  let combined = add_unique(step1, b)
  let sorted = sort_asc(combined)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
